blended.narrative: Hogadon is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Strong winds with gusts to 42 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 47°F, gusts to 42 mph.
Tomorrow: overcast, highs of 49°F, winds around 23 mph.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 20".
